    Description
    TextTooltipContent
    Tooltip content implementation that displays text with customizable styling.

    Tooltip manager that displays contextual information when users hover over components.

    Abstract base class for tooltip content implementations.
    TooltipManager
    Manages the display of tooltips.
    ValueOverlayManager
    Manages the display of a value overlay вЂ“ a transient text preview (e.g., for volume, brightness, etc.) that appears when a value changes.
